sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40492" key="e)piph/dhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπήδ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40492.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">springing upon, assault</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.916d</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.): metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁρμαὶ καὶ -σεις</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76c</biblScope></bibl>, etc.; of the male animal, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">768e</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1095a</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
